name: Stuffed Pepper Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tops off the peppers and clean inside.
2. Cook peppers in water to cover for 20 minutes.
3. Brown the ground beef and onions.
4. Add seasonings, rice, corn, and tomato sauce.
5. Heat until bubbly.
6. Spoon filling into peppers; place in a casserole dish.
7. Place extra filling, if any, around peppers.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes.
